title: Write a test that reproduces a race condition between allow and worker query
prompt: Write `test/my_app/race_reproduction_test.exs` that DELIBERATELY reproduces a race condition — useful as a regression test for a fix to the allow/3 API. The test must: (1) spawn a `Task.Supervisor.async_nolink/2` child that does `Process.sleep(1); Repo.all(User)` (the sleep forces the child to check for the DB connection AFTER the test process has a chance to call allow/3), (2) call `Ecto.Adapters.SQL.Sandbox.allow(MyApp.Repo, self(), task.pid)` after spawning, (3) `Task.await/1` the result, (4) assert success. The test should be `async: true` and use enough deliberate Process.sleep calls to force the race to manifest under repeated runs. Include a comment explaining that this is a regression test for race hunting, NOT production test code.
tier_rationale: Intentional race reproduction — requires deep understanding of the allow timing.
